Localization.Description: Attempt to log in to the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} failed to change session's owner to {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system with {logon_service} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} logged in to the system with {logon_service} on host {event_src.host}
